mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.device_id) AS totalDeviceCount,
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.status != 'OFFLINE' THEN d.device_id END) AS activeDeviceCount,
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.status = 'OFFLINE' THEN d.device_id END) AS offlineDeviceCount,
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN el.log_id IS NOT NULL THEN d.device_id END) AS collectedDeviceCount,
IFNULL(SUM( CASE WHEN el.log_date = STR_TO_DATE(#{selectedDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') THEN el.daily_kwh ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS todayGenerationKwh,
IFNULL(SUM(el.daily_kwh), 0) AS monthlyGenerationKwh,
IFNULL(AVG(el.efficiency), 0) AS averageEfficiency,
IFNULL(AVG(el.efficiency), 0) AS averageSoc,
IFNULL(SUM( CASE WHEN el.log_date = STR_TO_DATE(#{selectedDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') THEN el.cost ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS todaySavedCost,
IFNULL(SUM(el.cost), 0) AS monthlySavedCost
FROM ess_device d
LEFT JOIN energy_log el ON d.device_id = el.device_id AND DATE_FORMAT(el.log_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(#{selectedDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), '%Y-%m')
WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId}
AND d.group_id = #{groupId}
AND d.device_id = #{deviceId}
SELECT group_id, group_name FROM ess_device_group WHERE member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT d.group_id FROM ess_device d LEFT JOIN monitoring m ON d.device_id = m.device_id AND m.record_time >= STR_TO_DATE(#{selectedDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND m.record_time < DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(#{selectedDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND MINUTE(m.record_time) = 0 WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} GROUP BY d.group_id HAVING SUM(m.solar_generation_kwh) > 0 ) t

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT d.device_id FROM ess_device d LEFT JOIN monitoring m ON d.device_id = m.device_id AND m.record_time >= STR_TO_DATE(#{selectedDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND m.record_time < DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(#{selectedDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND MINUTE(m.record_time) = 0 WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} GROUP BY d.device_id HAVING SUM(m.solar_generation_kwh) > 0 ) t

SELECT d.device_name AS label, d.device_name AS deviceName, IFNULL(g.group_name, '미지정 그룹') AS groupName, IFNULL(SUM(el.daily_kwh), 0) AS monthlyKwh, IFNULL(SUM(el.cost), 0) AS savedCost, IFNULL(AVG(el.efficiency), 0) AS efficiency, IFNULL(SUM(el.daily_kwh), 0) AS value
FROM ess_device d
LEFT JOIN ess_device_group g ON d.group_id = g.group_id
LEFT JOIN energy_log el ON d.device_id = el.device_id AND DATE_FORMAT(el.log_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(#{selectedDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), '%Y-%m')
WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId}
AND d.group_id = #{groupId}
GROUP BY d.device_id, d.device_name, g.group_name ORDER BY monthlyKwh DESC LIMIT 5
